titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Finnish Minister ( (Järnefelt))

div.head: The Secretary of State to the Finnish Minister ( Järnefelt )
div.p: Sir: In your note of February 1, 1935, you communicated to me the information that a complete record regarding the claims for the detention of thirteen Finnish sailing vessels was handed to the Legal Adviser of the Department on January 30, 1935.

I now inform you that the answer of the United States to the claim growing out of the alleged detention by the United States of thirteen Finnish sailing vessels was today handed in triplicate to Doctor Sigurd von Numers, Secretary of your Legation.Not printed.

In view of the answer handed to Doctor von Numers, it is not deemed necessary specifically to answer your predecessor’s note of December 20, 1934,
Foreign Relations, 1934, vol. ii, p. 161. relating to the claim. The answer handed to
Doctor von Numers may be regarded as an answer to any question raised in the note of December 20, 1934, as well as to other questions dealt with in the answer of the United States.
div.closer:
For the Secretary of State:
R. Walton Moore
